official_description_excerpt: Brings you to a cozy café on a sun-drenched morning. The scent blends rich, freshly brewed coffee with a hint of creamy vanilla and warm spices.

Experience the serenity of a matcha latte with this enchanting fragrance. Each spritz captures the creamy blend of earthy green tea and velvety milk.

official_description_excerpt: Man in Black Eau de Parfum embodies the radiant energy, hypnotic movement and primal intensity of Fire. This charismatic fragrance, bold yet mysterious, captures the untamed power of a flame.

full_name: Ex Nihilo Fleur Narcotique Eau de Parfum
official_description_excerpt: FLEUR NARCOTIQUE is a symphony of sensuality, capturing the Parisian essence of EX NIHILO. Lush florals intertwine with seductive woods, creating an intoxicating embrace.
Her Eau de Parfum is the first gourmand fragrance with a British twist by Burberry. A burst of red and dark berry notes lightened by a luminous, white woody accord.
Inspired by chaos and disorder this spicy and woody fragrance masquerades an interlude moment of harmony in its heart.

This fragrance stands out thanks to its perfectly crafted blend of sweet aged oud, pheromone imposing musk, and Indian sandalwood. Combined with fresh spices and a crisp rose, this scent is bold and unapologetic.
